历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4517 → 3822 → 4022 → 4602 → 5610, with a forward shift from 2021 to 2022 followed by a continuous backward shift from 2023 to 2025, accumulating a backward shift of about 1588 in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5610, the lowest in recent years; the enrollment plan for Physics Category was 55 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 74 in 2023, 78 in 2024, and 79 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 65, a reduction of about 17.7% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 19th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top normal universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no negative public opinion incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high, and application attention is stable; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including Psychology A+, Mathematics A, Statistics A, Geography A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Ecology A, etc., with strong strength in science-related disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; the total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is approximately 267,900, with an estimated 204,944 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 6.7% compared to 192,096 in 2025, intensifying competition; 2026; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, not a local institution in Fujian Province; the university's enrollment proportion for Physics Category in Fujian is about 3%–5%, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend in historical rankings in recent years, the reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (-17.7%) will intensify competition, the significant increase in Physics Category candidates in the province (+6.7%), and the sustained appeal of the university's top level and reputation, the ranking is expected to shift forward based on the 2025 baseline of 5610; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5014, with a range of 4514–5514.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 857 → 663 → 464 → 503 → 416, showing an overall forward trend (intensified competition), with a cumulative forward shift of about 48 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 416, the highest level in recent years; the enrollment plan for History Category was 26 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 32 in 2024, and 39 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 22, a significant reduction of about 43.6% compared to 2025, which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 19th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top normal universities nationwide; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Geography A+, Marxist Theory A+, etc., with top-tier disciplinary strength, strong attraction to candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no negative public opinion incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high, and application attention is stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of normal/education majors has shown a differentiated and wait-and-see trend in recent years, overall stable; the total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% compared to about 252,348 in 2025; the estimated number of History Category candidates is about 62,956, an increase of about 4.5% compared to 60,252 in 2025, with slightly intensified competition; 2026; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, not a local institution in Fujian Province; the university's enrollment proportion for History Category in Fujian Province is about 3%–5%, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the overall forward trend of historical rankings, the significant reduction in History Category enrollment in 2026 (-43.6%) which will markedly intensify competition, the slight increase in provincial candidates, and the sustained attraction of the university's top level and reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 416, the ranking is expected to move forward significantly; the predicted minimum ranking is about 307, with a range of 257–357.
